ogTitle: Fig Tree Pocket vs Finch Hatton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fig Tree Pocket and Finch Hatton.
heading: Fig Tree Pocket vs Finch Hatton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fig Tree Pocket, Queensland and Finch Hatton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Finch Hatton has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Fig Tree Pocket (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fig Tree Pocket or Finch Hatton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fig Tree Pocket has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Finch Hatton scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fig Tree Pocket scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Finch Hatton scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fig Tree Pocket or Finch Hatton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Finch Hatton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
